titleStmt.title: SII 8.746: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 746. (A.R. No. 430 of 1903). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmarā ṉa śrīrājentra coḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu [ja]yaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattup paṉaiyūrnāṭṭu vāvalūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉa n=ti ruvāmāttūruruṭaiya pa
ramasvāmi kaḷukku Uṭaiyār śrī rājentra coḻade var paṇimakaṉ coḻamaṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu
maṅkalanāṭṭup putukkuṭip putukkuṭaiyāṉ veḷāṉ Āruraṉ Ittiruvāmāttūruṭaiyār bhaṇḍā
rattu Irun=ta kācil kācu 1- ṉukku Āṭu Eṭṭāka kācu nūṟṟumuppattiraṇ ṭaṭṭik koṇṭu mutalāṉa Āṭu Ā
yirat taimpattāṟu Ivaiyiṟ tirunon=tā viḷak koṉṟiṉukku Āṭu toṇṇūṟṟāṟākat tirunon=tā vi
ḷakkup patiṉoṉṟiṉukku Ittiruvāmāttūruṭaiyā[ rkku ṉivan=ta] ñ cetuvarukiṉṟa Ittiruvāmāttūr maṉṟāṭi ciṅkappuli
nampeṟaṉun nakka ṉārūrum piccuvā ṉappiyu miccuvaran tākiyum vaṭataḷitirumālun nilaṉ ventiyuñ civatevaṉ putta
ṉuñ ciṟṟikecaṉumāka Ivvaṉaivaru muḷḷiṭṭa paṉmaṉṟāṭikaḷvacan tirunontāviḷak koṉṟiṉukku ney Uḻakkukku Ittiruno
n=tā viḷakkup patiṉoṉṟiṉukku nicata[ppaṭi ney Irunāḻi muvuḻakkākac cantrā ti- tya val laṭṭakkaṭavārkaḷāka viṭṭa Āṭu cāvā muvarap perā
ṭu Āyirat taimpattāṟu . Ivai panmā heśvarar rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 8.746 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
